name: rushee-marketplace
description: Rushee — Full-stack Flutter + Spring Boot engineering discipline: UX Discovery → Strategic DDD → Tactical DDD → FDD → OpenAPI Contract → BDD → ATDD → TDD → Flutter Implementation → Security → Observability. For juniors and teams using Claude or Cursor.

plugins.name: rushee
plugins.description: Complete engineering discipline for full-stack Flutter + Spring Boot: 27 skills, 18 agents, 16 commands, 7 hooks. Enforces UX-first, DDD, contract-first API, BDD/ATDD/TDD, Flutter clean architecture, security, and observability. Junior developers follow the full pipeline through simple prompts.
